CustomField.description: Calculated SLA deadline: process start date + nepa_statutory_deadline_days__c. Populated at record creation by NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator flow. Evaluated nightly by NEPA_Permit_SLA_Monitor to create overdue Tasks on critical-path permits past this date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: SLA deadline for this permit (process start + statutory deadline days). Used by the nightly SLA monitor for overdue alerts.
CustomField.label: SLA Due Date
